title: Opening for Software Engineer at AgroStar Global Group

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at AgroStar Global Group
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at AgroStar Global Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Navi Mumbai-based team.

About AgroStar Global Group:
AgroStar Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AgroStar Global Group!
